Address.title: Address
Address.description: Represents a hierarchical storage address within the facility.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Address entity.

unidade.description: The geographical unit or state (e.g., PR, SP).

rua.description: The macro location, like a corridor or room (e.g., R01).

movel.description: The medium location, like a shelf or cabinet (e.g., E05).

nivel.description: The micro location, like a shelf level or drawer (e.g., N03).

detalhe.description: Optional detail suffix for containers within a level (e.g., -P04).

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the address was created.

Budget.title: Budget
Budget.description: Represents a budget allocation for a specific sector or cost center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Budget entity.

costCenter.description: The name or code of the cost center.

sector.description: The specific sector the budget is allocated to (e.g., 'Ferramentaria', 'Suprimentos').

totalAmount.description: The total amount allocated for the budget period.

spentAmount.description: The amount of the budget that has already been spent.

Supply.title: Supply
Supply.description: Represents the master data for a supply item.

codigo.description: Unique, system-generated code for the supply item.

descricao.description: Detailed description of the supply item.

unidadeMedida.description: Unit of measure for the supply.

familia.description: The family/category of the supply item.

exigeLote.description: Indicates if lot tracking is required.

exigeSerialNumber.description: Indicates if serial number tracking is required.

exigeValidade.description: Indicates if expiration date tracking is required.

tipoMaterial.description: Specific material type, used for 'Matéria-Prima' family.

estoqueMinimo.description: The minimum stock level before a reorder is triggered.

estoqueMaximo.description: The maximum stock level to avoid over-purchasing.

localizacaoPadrao.description: Default storage address for this supply item.

fatorConversao.description: Conversion factor from primary to secondary unit (e.g., 1 UN = 1000 G).

pesoBruto.description: Gross weight in the secondary unit, including packaging.

imageUrl.description: URL of the supply item's photo.

documentoUrl.description: URL of the supply item's master document (e.g., technical sheet).

SupplyStock.title: SupplyStock
SupplyStock.description: Represents a specific batch of a supply item at a specific location.

loteInterno.description: System-generated lot number for this specific entry.

loteFornecedor.description: Optional lot number provided by the supplier.

quantidade.description: The quantity of items in the primary unit of measure.

pesoLiquido.description: The current quantity in the secondary unit of measure (e.g., remaining grams).

localizacao.description: The physical address code where this stock is stored.

dataEntrada.description: The timestamp when this stock was entered.

dataValidade.description: The expiration date for this stock, if applicable.

custoUnitario.description: The cost per unit for this specific entry.

status.description: The current status of this specific stock.

documentoUrl.description: URL of a document attached to this specific lot.

SupplyMovement.title: SupplyMovement
SupplyMovement.description: Records a single movement (in or out) of a supply item.

supplyId.description: The ID of the master supply item.

supplyStockId.description: The ID of the specific stock lot being moved.

supplyCodigo.description: The code of the master supply item for easy querying.

loteFornecedor.description: Supplier lot number, denormalized for history.

responsibleId.description: The UID of the user who performed the movement.

responsibleName.description: The name of the user for display.

origin.description: For 'entrada', the source (e.g., PO number, NF number).

destination.description: For 'saida', the destination (e.g., Work Order, Cost Center).

Tool.title: Tool
Tool.description: Represents a tool used in aircraft maintenance with intelligent taxonomy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tool entity (document ID).

classificacao.description: Defines the control and locking rule.

marca.description: The brand or manufacturer of the tool.

enderecamento.description: The storage location of the tool.

pn_fabricante.description: Manufacturer's Part Number (OEM for ESP, Plaque for GSE).

pn_referencia.description: Reference P/N for equivalent tools (which part it replaces).

aeronave_aplicavel.description: The applicable aircraft for the tool.

doc_engenharia_url.description: URL for the engineering document (mandatory for EQV).

doc_seguranca_url.description: URL for the safety document (e.g., manual, APR).

status.description: Current status of the tool (e.g., Ativo, Pendente, Bloqueado).

status_inicial.description: The initial status when created, especially for ALT type.

data_vencimento.description: Due date for Calibration, Load Test, or Expiration.

data_referencia.description: Reference date (last calibration, last test, manufacturing date).

documento_anexo_url.description: URL for the attached document (certificate, report).

label_url.description: URL of the generated tool label image.

natureza_item.description: The accounting nature of the item (e.g., 'Ativo Imobilizado', 'Consumo').

classificacao_contabil.description: The specific accounting classification or account number.

valor_estimado.description: The estimated financial value of the tool.

observacao.description: Observations about the tool's condition or non-conformity.

observacao_condicional.description: The condition for a conditional release.

data_descarte.description: The date and time the tool was discarded.

motivo_descarte.description: The reason for discarding the tool.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Represents a supplier of aircraft maintenance supplies.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier entity.

contactEmail.description: Email address of the supplier's contact person.

contactPhone.description: Phone number of the supplier's contact person.

CostCenter.title: CostCenter
CostCenter.description: Represents a cost center for budget allocation and expense tracking.

id.description: Unique ID for the cost center.

code.description: The code for the cost center (e.g., 'TI-01', 'MKT-02').

PurchaseRequisition.title: PurchaseRequisition
PurchaseRequisition.description: Represents the header of a purchase requisition (SC).

requesterId.description: UID of the user who created the request.

costCenterId.description: ID of the associated Cost Center.

neededByDate.description: The date when the items are needed.

PurchaseRequisitionItem.title: PurchaseRequisitionItem
PurchaseRequisitionItem.description: Represents a single item within a purchase requisition.

itemId.description: ID of the requested Supply or Tool item.

itemType.description: The type of item being requested.

notes.description: Additional notes or specifications for the item.

attachmentUrl.description: URL for an attached photo or reference.

Employee.title: Employee
Employee.description: Represents an employee in the system.

id.description: Unique sequential identifier for the Employee entity.

accessLevel.description: The access level of the employee (e.g., 'Admin', 'Técnico').

photoURL.description: URL of the employee's profile picture.

permissions.description: A map of screen names to booleans indicating access rights.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Expense entity.

amount.description: The monetary value of the expense.

paymentProofUrl.description: URL of the uploaded payment proof.

employeeId.description: Reference to Employee who registered the expense.

employeeName.description: Name of the employee who registered the expense for display purposes.

CalibrationRecord.title: CalibrationRecord
CalibrationRecord.description: Represents a historical record of a single tool calibration event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the calibration record.

toolId.description: The ID of the tool that was calibrated.

calibrationDate.description: The date the calibration was performed.

dueDate.description: The date the next calibration is due.

calibratedBy.description: Name of the employee or external company that performed the calibration.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this record was created in the system.

Kit.title: Kit
Kit.description: Represents a kit or toolbox containing a collection of tools, treated as a single inventory item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Kit entity (document ID).

codigo.description: Unique code for the kit (e.g., KIT-0001).

descricao.description: A description of the kit and its purpose.

toolIds.description: An array of document IDs of the tools included in this kit.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the kit was created.

status.description: Current status of the kit (e.g., Disponível, Em Empréstimo).

enderecamento.description: The storage location of the kit.

imageUrl.description: A generic image URL for the kit.

ToolRequest.title: ToolRequest
ToolRequest.description: Represents a request to loan one or more tools for a specific work order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the tool request.

osNumber.description: The work order number associated with the request.

requesterId.description: The Firebase UID of the employee who made the request.

requesterName.description: The name of the employee who made the request.

status.description: The current status of the request.

requestedAt.description: Timestamp of when the request was created.

dueDate.description: The expected return date for the tools.

toolIds.description: An array of document IDs of the requested tools.

handledBy.description: The UID of the ferramentaria user who handled the withdrawal.

handledAt.description: Timestamp of when the tools were withdrawn.

returnedAt.description: Timestamp of when the tools were returned.

returnConditions.description: A map of tool IDs to their inspection results upon return.

definition.description: Stores budget allocations for different sectors.
Stores the master data for supply items.
Stores individual, trackable batches of supplies as a subcollection of the master supply item.
Stores the historical log of all supply movements.
Stores aircraft maintenance tools and their calibration details based on intelligent taxonomy.
Stores tool kits, each containing references to multiple tools.
Stores the historical records of all calibrations for a specific tool, ensuring traceability.
Stores information about suppliers of aircraft maintenance supplies.
Stores the header for purchase requisitions.
Stores the items within a specific purchase requisition.
